context: Reimbursement policy for Hassan Blanchard's volunteer mileage and supply costs tied to the Cedarbrook Health Equity Program (pre-nursing community service). Covers small out-of-pocket expenses he can claim back so they do not come out of his tight student budget.
policy_name: Health Equity Program Volunteer Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.action: Reimburse approved volunteer mileage at $0.21 per mile and outreach supplies up to $25 per month
validation_rules.notes: Mileage covers drives to approved Atlanta-area community clinic shifts; supplies cover gloves, handouts, and nutrition recipe cards. Annual cap of $300 per student volunteer per academic year.
validation_rules.requirement: Submit a mileage log and itemized receipts within 30 days; coordinator Tanya Williams must approve before the 14-day direct-deposit payout. Alcohol, gift cards, and personal items are not eligible.
validation_rules.rule: Volunteer mileage and outreach supply reimbursement
